pi_items.source: Matomo PrivacyManager plugin source code (GitHub); enables automatic deletion of raw visitor logs
Matomo documentation recommends keeping detailed logs for 6 months (approximately 180 days) for privacy reasons. Matomo FAQ states '180 days' as a standard value for log retention.
Matomo PrivacyManager plugin source code (GitHub); enables automatic deletion of aggregated report data
Matomo documentation states '365 days = 1 year' as a standard reference point. Matomo recommends keeping aggregated reports longer than raw logs to preserve long-term trend data.
Matomo PrivacyManager plugin; Matomo documentation states 'It is generally best to check the box to Keep basic metrics unless you have a reason not to.'
Matomo PrivacyManager plugin supports keeping or deleting daily reports. Unchecked (0) indicates deletion of daily reports.
Matomo PrivacyManager plugin supports keeping or deleting weekly reports. Unchecked (0) indicates deletion of weekly reports.
Matomo PrivacyManager plugin; Matomo documentation states 'We recommend keeping monthly and yearly data as an interesting dataset'
Matomo PrivacyManager plugin; Matomo documentation states 'We recommend keeping monthly and yearly data as an interesting dataset'
Matomo PrivacyManager plugin source code (GitHub); controls preservation of segment reports during deletion
Task-defined scoring weight; subjective task design choice

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Matomo data retention settings in the PrivacyManager plugin. All configuration option names (delete_logs_enable, delete_logs_older_than, delete_reports_enable, delete_reports_older_than, and all delete_reports_keep_* variants) are real Matomo PrivacyManager options stored in the matomo_option database table. The specified retention periods of 180 days for raw visitor logs and 365 days for aggregated reports align with Matomo documentation recommendations: 180 days (6 months) is recommended for privacy compliance, and 365 days (1 year) provides retention for long-term trend analysis. The configuration settings are correct: keep basic metrics (1), delete daily/weekly reports (0), and retain monthly/yearly/segment reports (1), which matches Matomo's documented best practices stating 'We recommend keeping monthly and yearly data'. All expected_settings metadata values are verified against official Matomo documentation and source code.
